STAR_BLADE.title: StarBlade
STAR_BLADE.description: When {singleStarIcon} is spent,gain Forging equal to the number spent * [blue]{CurrentActIndex}[/blue] (multiplier equals current act number).When 3 or more {singleStarIcon} are spent in a single use, upgrade all your Sovereign Blade cards for the rest of combat.
EN_LOYAL.title: En Loyal
EN_LOYAL.description: When you play a [green]Sovereign Blade[/green], it goes into your draw pile instead of the discard pile.
